input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.7.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.7.6
            TITLE: changes to the cost report in the cost addendum will incur additional cost:

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.7.6: Changes to the Cost Report in the Cost Addendum will incur additional cost:
S.3.7.6 Changes to the Cost Report in the Cost Addendum will incur additional cost: 
a. Added items will be cost at 125% of the table cost: + (1.25 x Cost) 
b. Removed items will be credited 75% of the table cost: - (0.75 x Cost)

final_answer: Changes to the Cost Report in the Cost Addendum will incur additional cost: S.3.7.6 Changes to the Cost Report in the Cost Addendum will incur additional cost: a. Added items will be cost at 125% of the table cost: + (1.25 x Cost) b. Removed items will be credited 75% of the table cost: - (0.75 x Cost)
